title: 1986 Horsetooth Mini Classic, Boys 10 - 11, Stage 1 Time Trial

enrichment.summary: Footage from a 1986 youth cycling event called the Horsetooth Mini Classic in Fort Collins, featuring boys aged 10-11 preparing for Stage 1, a time trial. The clip shows riders lining up and being called to the start by number.
enrichment.speaker: other

claims.subject: Kyle's team
claims.claim: My team made 31st in 1986 in Fort Collins.

claims.subject: Kyle's team
claims.claim: We were getting ready for the time trial, stage one.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I just saw them lining up for the time trial.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to start with a brighter number, 270 degrees.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wind them down before starting.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: You have to force two people to start.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We need to stabilize before starting.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Number 274 is part of the lineup.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The 1011 is part of the lineup.

transcript.text: This is Mini Classic, May 19, May 31st, 1986, Fort Collins, getting ready for the Time Trial, Stage 1, Time Trial, this is the lineup, getting ready to get ready, this is Wyndham lining up for the Time Trial.
Steve Reed is Writer number 274 in the 10-11...
